title: Mission D front suspension honesty gate — Monobeam extracted; FGAWR baseline corrected; torques rejected
summary: Admit honesty-gated Subsystem Mission D evidence brief. Promote F-450/F-550 4x2 front axle architecture to ASSERTION_EXTRACTED Monobeam from SRC-CAND-000010. Reject operator standard FGAWR=5600 for Reg Cab 4x2 145.3 (actual Max Std 4800/5200 by engine). Reject all EXACT_MATCH torque/alignment claims pending WSM. Initialize CFGCOMP-…-FRONT-SUSPENSION as CANDIDATE. Keep Mission E deferred. Do not open Mission F as substitute for incomplete Mission D.

architecture_decision.supersedes: PRIMARY_SOURCE_REQUIRED open architecture question for series-level type (still not ASSERTION_VERIFIED; BAG parse + physical confirmation remain)
still_forbidden: Import 4x4 live monobeam geometry as 4x2 truth

next_mission_selection.option_b_mission_f_lv_network: NOT_OPENED — would be MISN-000006 if authorized later; LV path already gated by MISN-000003 WSM/EWD
next_mission_selection.rationale: Mission D is only partially complete. Opening E or F now would skip primary-source gaps (WSM torque/alignment, BAG parse, spring codes).
